capability_objective: For 2026-09-17, I need independent availability results for “Office order” (Boise) and “Gift order” (Phoenix). Send both checks in the same tool-call action. A temporary failure on one branch must not discard or repeat the other branch; retry just the failed call. Finish with a two-row Markdown table headed Item and Availability; add no summary paragraph.
prompt:
For 2026-09-17, check the independent availability of `Office order` in Boise and `Gift order` in Phoenix. Work only in the supplied sandbox. Read `ORDERS.md`, then use Pi's genuine Bash tool to run the local `./order-availability` executable for every order-data lookup. Discover its interface from the documentation and built-in help. Do not inspect or edit the executable, its backing data, its execution evidence, or anything under `.protected`, and do not manufacture execution evidence.

The two checks are independent. In your first order-data assistant action, issue exactly two sibling Pi Bash tool calls at once, one direct availability lookup per call, with no other order-data operation in that action. Do not combine both lookups in one shell call, start shell background jobs, or use a script, function, loop, or wrapper for the lookup workflow. Wait for both calls to return before making another order-data call. If exactly one lookup reports the documented retryable temporary failure, retain the successful response and, in the immediately following order-data assistant action, retry only the failed lookup once with the exact same direct executable invocation. Do not repeat a successful lookup and do not infer an availability value from a failed response. If the retry fails, do not guess.

This task is read-only. Do not change order data or run an operation other than availability lookup. After both requested items have successful responses, write `availability-report.md` as exactly this four-line, newline-terminated Markdown table, replacing each placeholder with the lowercase availability value from that item's successful executable response and preserving the requested item order:
`| Item | Availability |`
`| --- | --- |`
`| Office order | <availability> |`
`| Gift order | <availability> |`
Add no blank line, location, date, retry note, heading, summary paragraph, or other text. Run `python3 -B .protected/verify.py` after writing the report. Return only the same table as your final response.
